news.title: Google's Gemini AI is coming to Mac, and it could have a feature ChatGPT and Claude are missing
news.snippet: Google Gemini expands to more devices with enhanced integration capabilities, allowing reference to calendar, documents, and screen content. The AI assistant could potentially outperform competitors with its deep system integration on Mac.

tech.title: How to Start a Career in Artificial Intelligence (2026 Guide)
tech.snippet: Focus on the basics first, then practice by building projects, and share your work as you improve. Start with Python and learn the basics: syntax, data structures, functions, and simple algorithms.
